role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Strictly analyzed scripts and place-name etymology ('CÉDEZ LE PASSAGE', 'SAINT DIZIER').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Leyland cypress) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road signs, markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and street furniture cues to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic and regulatory agents provided definitive, image-grounded evidence (French text on signs) that drove the correct identification. The tournament correctly prioritized this hard evidence over the ambiguous visual cues used by landscape and meta agents.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Text on signs accurately transcribed and identified.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Description of stucco walls and rolling terrain matches image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Yield sign and directional post accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Architectural details (roof tiles, trim) accurately observed.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified France as the ground truth.
